# Tuteliq Kotlin SDK

> Official Kotlin SDK for Tuteliq — AI-powered child safety API for Android and JVM applications.

## What is this?
A Kotlin library for the Tuteliq child safety API. Detect bullying, grooming, self-harm, substance promotion, and other harmful content. Works with Android (API 26+) and JVM (11+) applications.

## Install
// build.gradle.kts
dependencies {
    implementation("ai.tuteliq:tuteliq-kotlin:1.0.0")
}

## Quick Start
import ai.tuteliq.Tuteliq
val client = Tuteliq(apiKey = System.getenv("TUTELIQ_API_KEY"))
val result = client.detectUnsafe(text = "content to check", ageGroup = "13-15")

## Key Features
- Kotlin coroutines support
- Android and JVM compatible
- All 20+ Tuteliq API endpoints
- 16+ detection categories (KOSA compliant)
- Age group calibration
- Ktor-based HTTP client

## Links
- Website: https://tuteliq.ai
- Documentation: https://docs.tuteliq.ai
- GitHub: https://github.com/Tuteliq/kotlin
